import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/staff/DocumentSuite.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/DocumentSuite.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import DocumentSuite from "/src/app/pages/org-admin/DocumentSuite.tsx";
export default function StaffDocumentSuite() {
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: DocumentSuite, _fgS: "gif0", _fgB: 1779104382230, _fgD: true, role: "staff", "data-fg-gif0": "418.293:418.146:/src/app/pages/staff/DocumentSuite.tsx:4:10:113:30:e:DocumentSuite::1::::vfj" }, void 0, false, {
    fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/DocumentSuite.tsx",
    lineNumber: 24,
    columnNumber: 10
  }, this);
}
_c = StaffDocumentSuite;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "StaffDocumentSuite");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/DocumentSuite.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/DocumentSuite.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
